subject: [PATCH v3 3/4] memcg: int16_t for cached slab stats

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch modifies the memcg code to use int16_t instead of int to store cached slab statistics in struct obj_stock_pcp. This change reduces the memory usage by half on 64-bit machines, where each counter is 4 bytes. The existing PAGE_SIZE flush mechanism is modified to handle the new storage size and prevent overflow when accumulating values.
